description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features clean, geometric lines and a combination of white and gray exterior surfaces, complemented by large glass windows and sliding doors. The property includes a driveway with a carport, a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, and landscaped green areas with scattered trees and shrubs. The front entrance is set back from the street, with a paved walkway leading to the main door. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a patio area adjacent to the pool, providing ample outdoor living space. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a carport, and a backyard pool, surrounded by landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front and side of the bungalow, highlighting the driveway, carport, and main entrance, with the pool and backyard visible to the right.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear of the bungalow, showcasing the backyard, swimming pool, patio area, and extensive landscaping.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the opposite side of the bungalow, emphasizing the side elevation, carport, and the pool area to the left.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a direct view of the front facade, focusing on the driveway, carport, and main entrance, with landscaping along the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
